description:
Strip unused properties from API response payloads. Add server-side field selection so clients request only needed data. Audit for over-fetching patterns.

**Rationale:** Smaller payloads reduce bandwidth consumption and JSON parse time. Compound benefit on paginated/list endpoints.
title: API payload trimming and selective field fetching
